scope: Fixture-valid Kernel-local coverage index for important Elementor V4 official documentation areas. This is not a full Elementor documentation mirror and not target-project evidence.

source_policy.official_docs_policy: Official Elementor documentation proves documented Elementor capability only.
source_policy.workbook_policy: EV4-Workbook-Jinja may identify educational coverage areas but is never official Elementor truth.

required_doc_areas.title: Editor V4 activation
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: Activation and version prerequisites are context for project evidence, not a core element card.
required_limitations: Does not prove target project has Editor V4 enabled.

required_doc_areas.title: Atomic Elements and V4 features
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: Atomic element discovery and panel grouping are editor context, not a separate MVK card.
required_limitations: Does not prove target project availability or Builder execution.

required_doc_areas.title: Local and Global Classes
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: Class behavior is class-governance context, not an MVK core element card.
required_limitations: Does not prove target class inventory, current permission, or safe mutation.

required_doc_areas.title: Class priority and cascade
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: Class priority is class governance, not element selection.
required_limitations: Does not approve target class mutation or prove target class inventory.

required_doc_areas.title: Class Manager
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: Class Manager is governance context, not a core element card.
required_limitations: Does not prove current user permission or safe mutation.

required_doc_areas.title: User roles and classes
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: Permission boundaries constrain evidence and mutation; they are not element selection.
required_limitations: Does not prove current target user role.

required_doc_areas.title: Element states
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: State styling is control/class context, not a core element card.
required_limitations: Does not prove runtime hover, focus, active, selected, or accessibility behavior.

required_doc_areas.title: Responsive editing inheritance
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: Responsive inheritance is a Responsive/runtime boundary, not a core element card.
required_limitations: Responsive docs are not browser/runtime validation.

required_doc_areas.title: Reset style settings
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: Reset behavior is control-level documentation, not an element card.
required_limitations: Requires reconciliation with V3/V4 differences before hard reset claims.
source_quality_notes: Reset style settings and V3/V4 differences docs should be rechecked together before reset-to-default claims.

required_doc_areas.title: Variables
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: Variable use and type boundaries are design-system context, not a core element card.
required_limitations: Does not prove target variable inventory, values, or active Pro availability.

required_doc_areas.title: Variables Manager
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: Variable management is design-system context, not a core element card.
required_limitations: Does not prove target variable inventory or Elementor Pro availability.

required_doc_areas.title: Components dependencies
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: Components are design-system blocks and dependency boundaries, not MVK core cards.
required_limitations: Does not prove active Pro license, Admin permission, or target availability.

required_doc_areas.title: Dynamic Tags in V4
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: Dynamic data depends on target WordPress data sources, not core element selection.
required_limitations: Does not prove target data source availability.

required_doc_areas.title: Interactions
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: Interactions affect behavior and runtime evidence; they are not core element-selection cards.
required_limitations: Does not prove Builder execution or observed runtime behavior.

required_doc_areas.title: Nested links
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: Nested links are topology constraints used by existing cards, not a separate element card.
required_limitations: Proves editor restriction only, not Builder execution or runtime click validation.

required_doc_areas.title: Editor V3/V4 differences
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: V3/V4 compatibility is project/page context, not a core element card.
required_limitations: Does not prove target page compatibility.

required_doc_areas.title: Viewport control
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: Viewport control constrains responsive evidence and screenshots, not core element selection.
required_limitations: Does not prove complete breakpoint semantics or runtime behavior.

required_doc_areas.title: Breakpoint semantics
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: Breakpoint semantics require a specific current official source before stronger Kernel claims.
required_limitations: Responsive Editing and Viewport Control are not treated as complete breakpoint semantics.
source_quality_notes: Explicit insufficient-evidence gap retained until a breakpoint-specific official source is inspected.

required_doc_areas.title: Logical properties
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: Logical properties are property-level context, not a core element card.
required_limitations: Does not create a full control registry or prove runtime behavior.

required_doc_areas.title: Attributes
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: Attributes are property-level V4 General-tab context, not a core element card.
required_limitations: Does not prove safe target mutation, Builder execution, or runtime DOM output.

required_doc_areas.title: UI path and exact setting location boundaries
required_doc_areas.no_decision_card_reason: Exact UI paths are source-specific setting-location context, not target environment proof.
required_limitations: Official docs may document a UI path for an article date, but not the target environment UI path.
source_quality_notes: UI path claims remain bounded to inspected official docs and must not be generalized to target WordPress environments.
